 forward email to gnats
 
 - -------- Original Message --------
 Subject: Re: fbsd MT ports
 Date: Tue, 14 Sep 2010 14:46:49 +0900
 From: Takefu <takefu@airport.fm>
 Reply-To: takefu@airport.fm
 To: pgollucci@p6m7g8.com
 
 Hi
 
 Philip M. Gollucci $B$5$s$O=q$-$^$7$?(B (2010/09/14 13:36):
 > Hi,
 > 
 > 1) Would like to take maintainership?
 Sure anything.$B!!(B:-)
 
 > 2) Can you please submit a comprehensive update as 1 PR
 >    Any changes should be a diff
 >    Any newly created ports should be a shar.
 I want to attach.
 Just let me know if you have a shortage.
 
 
 - --
